comment.body:
Originally, the dealer-flow model said that if volatility starts to fall above 5,709 the price action can climb the gamma. That’s because traders trade based on their positioning and want the price to go up. If volatility had broken out instead, that stabilizing effect wouldn’t have kicked in.
But when the put signal came in, she said that at 5,720 you need to pay attention to how sharply volatility is dropping, cause there was a big local long gamma exposure there.. and since that Trump pump was pretty fragile and looked ripe for mean reversion, even a small shock could break it. So if volatility eases here, it means the squeeze is over and the move is at the mercy of dealer flow..which, given the upside long gamma, means they’ll be selling
The contextual difference is really important. Hope that makes sense

So if volatility eases here, it means the squeeze is over and the move is at the mercy of dealer flow..which, given the upside long gamma, means they’ll be selling
The contextual difference is really important. Hope that makes sense

comment.body: We have to see if China is hurting the way Trump wants us to believe. Apr exports were expected flat but were up 8%. 20% reduction to US in there. They are experts in manufacturing (maybe not quality in all goods) but they can retool and reroute with the best. Question is price of goods in this mix.

comment.body:
🔸 SPX Game Plan – Friday, May 09
“Long over the weekend? What could go wrong... or go right?”
CONTEXT
$SPX closed 5663.94 (+0.6%) as /ES ramped overnight on U.S.–U.K. trade optimism
Afternoon fade held 5650 into the close after tagging 5720 (30D high = 5732 on Apr 04)
$VIX dropped to 22.48 (from 23.55) — volatility cooling trend continues
🔑 RANGE KEY LEVELS
5625 / 5665 / 5680 (7AM spot) / 5700–5710 / 5750 / 5785 / 5800–5825
→ More granularity in #0DTE Road Map
🗓️ EVENTS & EARNINGS
🕚 11:45 AM ET: NY Fed Staff Nowcast
BMO: $AMCX $ENB $GOGO
Light calendar — watch #SPX #ES_F and headlines on X for the real action
⚙️ IV / CLUSTERS / PIVOTS
Straddle = ±45 (tightest in weeks; IV > RV continues)
5650–5725 = chop zone / straddle goalposts
Cluster stack: 5645, 5560–5575–5710, 5725, 5750+
Vol term structure: $VIX9D 21.6 < $VIX 22.5 < $VIX3M 23.85
$VVIX = 96.29 (sub-100 zone)
📍 $SPX 0DTE ROAD MAP (ref. spot 5670 at 7:30 AM)
Chop Zone = 5650–5725
🔼 IF > 5675 → 5690 reaction
🔼 IF > 5690 → 5700 battle (chop at 5695–5710)
🔽 IF < 5675 → 5660 (Thurs close zone)
🔽 IF < 5660 → 5645–5655 chop / 5650 fight
🔼 IF > 5710 → 5725 test (top of chop / Thu high)
Below Chop:
🔽 IF < 5650 → 5635 (Wed LOD)
🔽 IF < 5635 → 5625 stall / reversal zone
🔽 IF < 5625 → 5600 = extreme support
Above Chop:
🔼 IF > 5725 → 5740 (mean reversion stall zone)
🔼 IF > 5740 → 5750 = 200DMA test
🔼 IF > 5750 → 5760–5775
🔼 IF > 5775 → 5800 = upper extreme
🧠 ADDITIONAL CONSIDERATIONS
• Weekend = Hopium vs Headline risk (#geopolitics #macro #supplychains)
• MOPEX compression expected early next week
• Buyback window active
• Systematic flows supportive → passive bid (CTA, vol-control)
• Vol structure normalizing (contango-ish)
• Expect chop, pinning, low delta-expectancy setups
• Watch X for updates if I post between trades
#SPX #SPY #ES_F #0DTE #VIX #Options #MarketUpdate #Volatility #TechnicalAnalysis #GammaExposure #FridayFlows #CTA #Buybacks #Macro #TradePlan #WeekendRisk #MOPEX
